descriptionEn:
Lesser Training Arcana obtained.

When enhancing the Arcana, registering Lesser Training Arcana as a material will increase the Enhance EXP by 200.
descriptionFr:
Lesser Training Arcana obtenu.

Lors de l’amélioration de l’arcane, utiliser Lesser Training Arcana comme matériau augmente l’EXP d’amélioration de 200.
